main.description: Ask a space's managing app whether to authorize a requesting user for a space credential. Served by the managingApp (not the PDS), called by the space authority at mint time when mintPolicy is 'managing-app'. Authenticated with service auth from the authority.

user.description: The DID of the requesting user.

clientId.description: The attested client_id, if a client attestation was presented.

authorized.description: Whether the managing app authorizes the request.
